component_contract_sha256.description: Required non-null in family mode (hash of contract.json). Null only allowed when mode=standalone-fallback (no design package).

mode_inference.description: Recorded when project_mode is unset and inferred from existing directory layout. Explains how the mode was determined.

state_bindings.description: Maps component state names (from contract.json states[]) to engineering state implementation paths or variables.

token_refs.description: Token names referenced by this component (from tokens.json). Used for cross-validation against contract.json token_refs.

path.description: Path to mock handler file or directory

endpoints.description: List of mocked endpoint paths (e.g., GET /todos, POST /todos)

mock_api.description: Mock API configuration for this component. Consumed by Phase 3 mock-to-real-switch to locate mock handlers.

property.description: CSS property that uses a hardcoded value

token_exceptions.description: Documented exceptions to the token-only rule. Each exception must have a concrete reason.

source.description: Approved brand system or constitution reference

brand_overrides.description: Intentional overrides of anti-pattern defaults per approved brand system. Accessibility, consistency, and evidence gates still apply.

aspect.description: What aspect requires human verification (e.g., visual polish, motion feel, brand rendering)

reason.description: Why automated testing is not applicable

manual_verification.description: Components or aspects not amenable to automated testing. TDD does not fabricate tests for these; they are 👤 human-confirmation items.
